rationale: All 46 discovered qualified-reproducible-build candidates were executed against the exact candidate-aware A-EVIDENCE-001, A-LIC-001, A-REPORT-001, and A-REPRO-001 oracles and failed; the PMORG-owned qualified build implementation passed its exact bounded 12-test post-disposition qualification suite, so no passing reusable candidate, selected candidate, patch, or deviation exists.
